series_metadata.series_description: This form is used when written warrant fails to arrive for intended receiver. The person or company failing to receive the warrant must fill out this form and send it to Division of Business Administration and forwarded to the Auditor of State for the issuance of a new warrant. Original to Auditor of State. Allied Material - Business Administration.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: audit by Auditor of State and audit report is released
